title: SEIU Local 509 — Public Sector
description: Scraped Markdown of the SEIU Local 509 'Public Sector' page covering the union's Massachusetts state-worker chapters: DCF, DTA/EOHLC, DDS, DMH, MassAbility, DESE, DOR/CSS, MassHealth, CCJ, IST, DPH, MCB/MCDHH, and DEEC. Describes the Local 509-Commonwealth Human Service Workers Training Fund (established 2020; training, grants, and $200,000+/year in scholarships) and links to state benefits (MPEF vision/dental), retirement information, the public-sector grievance form, and the state contract. Authoritative reference for Local 509 public-sector membership, including DDS examiners.
notes: Authoritative: official SEIU Local 509 union content scraped from seiu509.org. Directly relevant to the 509dds project because it enumerates the state-worker chapters including DDS (Department of Developmental Services). The Training Fund was 'established in 2020' but the page has no overall publication date, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Leading lines are cookie-consent chrome; trailing block is the gtranslate switcher.
